ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "product_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the product subcategory */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "custom_color" TEXT /* Custom color specified by the customer (if any) */,
  "custom_length" REAL /* Custom length specified by the customer (if any) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Warehouse location of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
